question: What is the probability that the daily average temperature at the French weather station at Tours will be higher on each resolution date listed below than on 2026-01-18?
resolution_criteria:
Resolves to the value found at https://db.nomics.world/meteofrance/TEMPERATURE/celsius.07240.D once the data is published.

The exact value on 2026-01-18 is unknown, but the most recent known value (as of 2026-01-08) was -1.975. (The daily average temperature at the French weather station at Tours.)
background: The history of Average temperature by day and by station for France - Degree Celsius - TOURS - Daily from Météo-France is available at https://db.nomics.world/meteofrance/TEMPERATURE/celsius.07240.D.
